title: Lead Instructional Designer at Anna University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Anna University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!
